MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Dennis Hyde, Esq. represented Plaintiff Malta & Co. Inc. and Defendant Will Dean appeared in pro per. The case did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
